response.justification: Bogdan's resume lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows platform, instead focusing on web, mobile, and embedded systems with languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, and D. While he has some C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI, sound position server), it does not meet the core requirement. Additionally, there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or fixed-income/capital markets domain knowledge.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Open-source contributions and active involvement in tech community
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (5–10 years on Windows platform)
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle database experience
Lacks fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise
